extracted_information: BudBot is an AI Budtender Cannabis Bot and virtual shopping assistant designed for cannabis dispensaries. It leverages natural language processing (NLP) and ChatGPT technology to provide 24/7 customer support, personalize recommendations, and optimize sales.

specifications.technology: Advanced Natural Language Processing (NLP) cannabis technology, ChatGPT cannabis chatbot architecture, Cannabis Voice AI, Multi-tenant SaaS Architecture, REST API Integration, JWT Authentication, Webhook Support, Mobile-responsive Widget
specifications.security_compliance: SOC 2 Certified, GDPR/CCPA Compliant, Enterprise-grade encryption, Secure data storage, Regular security audits

features.name: AI Budtender Cannabis Recommendations
features.description: Advanced cannabis strain finder AI. Understands customer needs (e.g., 'something citrusy for focus'). Instantly finds matching products from live inventory with terpene profiles and effects.
details: Natural language processing cannabis technology understands slang and terminology
Filters by effects, flavors, and price range

features.name: Intelligent Cross-Selling
features.description: Monitors cart contents and suggests relevant add-ons (e.g., compatible battery for vape cartridge).

features.name: Smart Discount Optimization
features.description: Detects cart abandonment and automatically offers the best available coupon (e.g., 'Add one more edible for free shipping!').

features.name: Remembers Every Customer's Preferences
features.description: Provides personalized greetings, loyalty point reminders, and suggestions based on purchase history for returning customers.

features.name: Upsell Mapping
features.description: Drag-and-drop interface to pair products with add-ons and set priority scores.

features.name: Promotion Builder
features.description: Create discount triggers by cart value, SKU, customer segment, or date with flat, percent, or BOGO options.

features.name: Brand Customization
features.description: Choose tone presets (friendly, expert, concise) and customize greetings, responses, and appearance.

features.name: Template Library
features.description: Pre-write responses for common questions; BudBot inserts them when intent matches.

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Track upsell lift, coupon ROI, response time, and customer satisfaction with CSV export.

features.name: API Integration
features.description: Connect with POS, inventory system, and CRM through robust API endpoints.

features.name: Cannabis Voice AI
features.description: Voice-enabled cannabis strain finder AI allows hands-free product discovery and virtual shopping assistant interaction.

features.name: Mobile-responsive Widget
features.description: Optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences.

features.name: Webhook Support
features.description: Real-time notifications for human escalation and events.

customer_testimonials.quote: BudBot increased our online sales by 22% in just 2 months. Our customers love getting instant, expert recommendations, and our staff can focus on high-value activities instead of answering the same questions all day.
The personalization is incredible. BudBot remembers what each customer likes and makes perfect suggestions. Our average order value went up 18% and cart abandonment dropped significantly.

training.ai_training: Cannabis-specific AI training (understands cannabis terminology, slang, customer intent). AI is trained to avoid medical advice and stay within legal boundaries.
training.staff_training: Quick 30-minute training session for your team (Step 4 of setup process)

inventory_integration.sync_method: Real-time Inventory Sync (instant updates when products go in/out of stock)
inventory_integration.api_integration: REST API Integration to connect with any POS or inventory system via secure APIs
setup_steps: Quick Integration Setup: Connect your POS and inventory system with our simple API
Inventory Sync Configuration: Set up real-time inventory sync and product mappings

compliance_features.general: Compliance-built responses, built with cannabis regulations in mind
regulations_followed: State Regulation Compliance: Automatically follows state-specific cannabis regulations and advertising restrictions
GDPR/CCPA Compliant: Full compliance with data privacy regulations and customer data rights
compliance_features.content_restrictions: No Medical Claims: AI is trained to avoid medical advice and stay within legal boundaries
compliance_features.age_verification: Age Verification Integration: Seamlessly integrates with your existing age verification systems
security_measures: Secure Data Handling: Enterprise-grade encryption and secure data storage with regular security audits
SOC 2 Certified: Independently verified security controls and data protection measures
